game_name: Shinobi III: Return of the Ninja Master

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Expanded move set distinguishes this entry from predecessor
Environmental hazards increase in final levels

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platform areas between enemy encounters
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action platformer with escalating difficulty. Earlier levels described as easier than predecessor, maintaining player momentum. Notable spike in difficulty on final level.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible and less frustrating than predecessor; faster gameplay compensates for lower difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate difficulty with tricky boss encounters
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final level notably difficult; reviewers cited it as 'freaking impossible'
notable_spikes: Final level represents significant difficulty spike
Boss encounters described as 'tricky' throughout game

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level concludes with boss fight requiring pattern recognition and special move mastery
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic boss pattern across all levels

notable_level_patterns.description: Alternates between combat encounters and platforming sections with environmental hazards
